working_endpoints: POST /api/tts/generate (NEW - returns 503 with proper error when no API key)

Text analysis flow: Full end-to-end with provided sample script

NEW Share button (Share2 icon) visible in breakdown header

Regenerate takes functionality working
All UI components have proper data-testid attributes
